# Role Onboarding Checklist Template

Use this checklist when onboarding a new team member into a project role. Copy this template, fill in the blanks, and track completion collaboratively between the new team member and their onboarding buddy / PM.

See also: [Roles & Personas](../octoacme-roles-and-personas.md) | [RACI Matrix](../role-responsibility-matrix.md)

---

## Onboarding Details

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Name** | _(new team member name)_ |
| **Role** | _(e.g., QA Lead, DevOps Engineer, Scrum Master)_ |
| **Start Date** | _(YYYY-MM-DD)_ |
| **Onboarding Buddy** | _(name + role)_ |
| **Project Manager** | _(name)_ |
| **Project / Team** | _(project name)_ |

---

## Week 1 — Access & Setup

### System Access
- [ ] GitHub repository access (appropriate team/role)
- [ ] Project board access (e.g., GitHub Projects, Jira, Linear)
- [ ] Communication channels (Slack/Teams — list relevant channels)
- [ ] CI/CD dashboard (e.g., GitHub Actions, Jenkins)
- [ ] Cloud/infrastructure console (if applicable)
- [ ] Monitoring and alerting dashboards (e.g., Datadog, Grafana)
- [ ] Document repository / wiki (e.g., Confluence, Notion)
- [ ] On-call rotation tool (if applicable)

### Dev/Work Environment
- [ ] Local development environment set up and working
- [ ] Code repository cloned and sample build/test run successfully
- [ ] VPN / SSO credentials configured
- [ ] Password manager / secrets vault access granted

---

## Week 1–2 — Documentation Reading List

### Required Reading
- [ ] [Project Management Overview](../octoacme-project-management-overview.md)
- [ ] [Roles & Personas](../octoacme-roles-and-personas.md) — understand your role and key interactions
- [ ] [RACI Matrix](../role-responsibility-matrix.md) — understand accountability for common activities
- [ ] [Execution & Tracking](../octoacme-execution-and-tracking.md) — team rhythm, workflows, escalation
- [ ] [Project Initiation](../octoacme-project-initiation.md)
- [ ] [Project Planning](../octoacme-project-planning.md)
- [ ] [Risks & Communication](../octoacme-risks-and-communication.md)
- [ ] [Release & Deployment](../octoacme-release-and-deployment.md)
- [ ] [Retrospective & Continuous Improvement](../octoacme-retrospective-and-continuous-improvement.md)
- [ ] [Acceptance Criteria Template](./acceptance-criteria-template.md)

### Role-Specific Reading
- [ ] _(add links to role-specific runbooks, architecture docs, or process guides relevant to this role)_
- [ ] Current sprint backlog and open items
- [ ] Most recent retrospective notes
- [ ] Current risk register

---

## Week 1–2 — Meetings to Attend

- [ ] **Onboarding 1:1** with Project Manager — context, expectations, and 30/60/90 goals
- [ ] **Onboarding 1:1** with Product Manager — product vision and roadmap
- [ ] **Team introduction** — meet the full project team
- [ ] **Daily standup** (observe first, then participate)
- [ ] **Sprint planning** (observe or participate based on timing)
- [ ] **Backlog refinement session**
- [ ] **Demo / sprint review** (observe)
- [ ] **Retrospective** (observe first sprint, then contribute)
- [ ] **Role-specific sync** — 1:1 with the person whose work you are taking over or partnering with

---

## Week 2–4 — Responsibilities Ramp-Up

- [ ] Shadow current owner for key responsibilities before taking them over
- [ ] Review and understand current sprint commitments and open items
- [ ] Attend the first standup where you are the named owner of at least one item
- [ ] Complete first assigned task or story
- [ ] Review [RACI Matrix](../role-responsibility-matrix.md) with PM — confirm your assigned activities
- [ ] Introduce yourself in relevant communication channels
- [ ] Understand the escalation path for your role (see [Execution & Tracking — Blocker Escalation](../octoacme-execution-and-tracking.md))

---

## Reporting Lines & Key Contacts

| Contact Type | Name | Role |
|---|---|---|
| Direct Manager / Lead | _(name)_ | _(role)_ |
| Project Manager | _(name)_ | Project Manager |
| Product Manager | _(name)_ | Product Manager |
| Scrum Master | _(name)_ | Scrum Master |
| Onboarding Buddy | _(name)_ | _(role)_ |
| _(Add other key contacts as needed)_ | | |

---

## 30 / 60 / 90 Day Goals

### 30-Day Goals (Learn & Observe)
- [ ] Complete all required reading
- [ ] Attend all key meetings listed above
- [ ] Gain all necessary system access
- [ ] Understand the team's current sprint, priorities, and open risks
- [ ] _(role-specific goal — e.g., "Review existing test plan" for QA Lead)_
- [ ] _(role-specific goal)_

### 60-Day Goals (Contribute & Collaborate)
- [ ] Own at least one recurring responsibility independently (see RACI Matrix)
- [ ] Complete and close at least one sprint's worth of deliverables
- [ ] Identify one process improvement opportunity and share with PM/SM
- [ ] Build relationships with key cross-functional partners (see "Interacts With" in Roles & Personas)
- [ ] _(role-specific goal)_
- [ ] _(role-specific goal)_

### 90-Day Goals (Lead & Improve)
- [ ] Fully own all responsibilities for this role without shadowing
- [ ] Propose and action at least one concrete process improvement
- [ ] Update role-specific documentation if gaps were found during onboarding
- [ ] Complete onboarding retrospective with PM and Onboarding Buddy
- [ ] _(role-specific goal)_
- [ ] _(role-specific goal)_

---

## Onboarding Sign-Off

| Milestone | Signed Off By | Date |
|---|---|---|
| Week 1 complete (access + reading list started) | _(name)_ | _(date)_ |
| 30-day goals reviewed | _(name)_ | _(date)_ |
| 60-day goals reviewed | _(name)_ | _(date)_ |
| 90-day goals reviewed — onboarding complete | _(name)_ | _(date)_ |
